resources.string: Click to find & associate your camera
Allow location access when the app is in the background
Allow the app to establish bluetooth connections
Allow the app to post notifications
Required for connecting to your Sony camera and accessing location data.
Allows continuous GPS sync to your camera even when the app is in the background or screen is off.
You\'ll need to select "Allow all the time" in the next dialog
No logs available yet. Logs will appear here as the app runs.
Some features may not work until these permissions are granted:\n%1$s
%s is required for the app to function
Background location access required for continuous GPS sync when app is not in foreground
Please enable Bluetooth to scan for devices.
Please enable location services for GPS functionality.
Enable the app in Settings to scan for nearby cameras.
Turn on automatic scanning in Settings to look for nearby cameras.
Make sure your camera is powered on and in Bluetooth pairing or discovery mode.
1. Turn on Bluetooth on both your iPhone and camera.
2. If the camera is not paired yet, enable pairing mode on the camera before tapping connect.
3. On the camera, open Network/Smartphone settings and enable location information link so GPS data can be received from the phone.
4. Make sure Location Services are enabled on iPhone and this app is allowed to access location.
Real-time GPS coordinates for your camera via Bluetooth
Pair your Sony camera with your phone via Bluetooth for seamless GPS data transfer
Automatically sync your phone's GPS coordinates to your camera for accurate geotagging
You can access these settings later from the main menu
Allow the app to run and sync GPS data with connected cameras
Automatically look for nearby cameras when the devices screen is visible
Reopen the onboarding flow the next time the app starts
The iOS build uses the same shared welcome, devices, and settings building blocks as Android.
If Google Play Services are missing or unreliable on your device, switch to the platform provider.
Restart the app and turn off the camera to apply this change. If always on mode is active, turn it off beforehand
Send anonymous crash reports to help improve the app
App restart required for changes to take effect
This app provides real-time GPS coordinates to your camera via Bluetooth, allowing for automatic geotagging of your photos without needing a camera's built-in GPS.
Check the app logs in the top menu for troubleshooting information, or review your device settings to ensure all permissions are granted.
How do I connect my camera to the app?

1. Make sure your camera supports Bluetooth connectivity and GPS tagging
2. Enable Bluetooth on your camera and phone
3. Put your camera in pairing mode, click on the camera on the main screen and follow the on-screen instructions (both camera and phone) 
 4. If this fails, remove any pairing in the Bluetooth settings of the phone and camera. Then try again
Why isn't my camera appearing in the list?

• Ensure your camera is in pairing/Bluetooth mode
• Check that your camera supports the required Bluetooth profile
• Make sure you're within range (typically 10 meters)
• Try restarting Bluetooth on your phone
How do I enable the service permanently? It seems to stop after a while

Please visit the App Settings and try the options in the Battery & Background section. Alternatively try the following: 
To keep GPS data syncing with your camera:
1. Go to your device's Settings > Apps
2. Find 'Alpha GPS' in the app list
3. Tap on it and select 'Battery'
4. Choose 'Don't optimize' or 'Allow background activity'
5. This prevents the system from stopping the GPS service

You can also access this through the device details page in the app.
My camera does not connect automatically, what can I do?

Unfortunately, there might be situations, where the automatic connection does not work. If you encounter issues please do the following: On the main screen, tap on your camera to open the details screen. There you have an option to enable the "Always On" mode, which will keep the app in the foreground. \nOtherwise try toggling bluetooth or remove the device from the app and associate it again.
What permissions does the app need?

The app requires:
• Location permissions (for GPS data)
• Bluetooth permissions (to connect to camera)
• Battery optimization exemption (for continuous service)
• Nearby devices permission (for device discovery)
How accurate is the GPS data?

GPS accuracy depends on:
• Satellite visibility (better outdoors)
• Weather conditions
• Your phone's GPS capabilities
• Typical accuracy is 3–5 meters under good conditions
Does the app work in the background?

Yes, once properly configured:
• The service runs in the background to maintain GPS sync
• Make sure to disable battery optimization
• The app will show a persistent notification when active
• GPS data is continuously sent to your connected camera
Tap the button above to start pairing your camera device.
No devices matching the given filter were found
Not paired, please pair the device in the bluetooth settings
To pair with your camera \'%1$s\', please:
2. Go to camera settings and enable Bluetooth/Pairing mode
3. Make sure the camera is discoverable
\nOnce your camera is ready, tap \'Continue\' to start pairing.
Devices running Android 11 and below must enable keepalive mode. Tap the device and enable the setting
Runs the app in the foreground. Useful if the connection cannot be established reliably on devices with aggressive battery saving measures (e.g. Xiaomi and probably more)

On the next screen, follow the instructions to pair your camera. Once pairing is complete, the app will automatically connect to your camera and start transmitting location data. If it does not start immediately, try restarting your camera.

If the default connection mode does not work, you can enable Always On mode after pairing your device. Tap the device entry on the main screen and turn on the toggle. This mode may use more battery, but only transmits location data when connected to the camera.
Show welcome screen on next launch
Will show welcome screen on next launch!
Yes! Please visit the Github page \nYou can also report issues with the App there or contact us via email:
If you like the app and want to support development, you can buy me a coffee ☕️

The app does not transmit any personal data to the developer or third parties. All collected information (location data) is only used to transfer GPS coordinates to your connected camera and is not permanently stored. Location collection stops as soon as the connection to the camera is disconnected. If you have any questions or concerns, please contact us via the email address mentioned above.
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s?
Auto starts the app after a device reboot for configured "Always On" devices.

Note: Due to recent changes in the app, you may need to perform a one-time action if you encounter issues after disabling Always On mode. Simply deactivate and reactivate the device once in these settings. This is only needed once after the app update – subsequent mode changes will work immediately.

Would you like to help us improve the app by sending anonymous crash reports and error logs? This information helps us identify and fix issues. No personal data or location information is transmitted. You can change this setting later in the app settings.
Enjoying the app? Tips help cover the Apple Developer Program fee ($99/year) required to keep this app on the App Store. It's completely optional — thank you for using Alpha GPS! ❤️
Thank you so much for your support! ️
Tip options are not available right now.
If this is the first time connecting this camera to your phone, please make sure to enable Bluetooth pairing mode in your camera's settings before continuing. If this is not the case, simply continue
